label: The Efflorescent Colonnade
description: The Efflorescent Colonnade comprises a linear field of fractured basalt pillars arranged in a precise, repeating cadence across Brineshade’s saline flats. Heavy salt efflorescence sheets the stone in pale crusts, preserving tool-cut edges and erasing finer surface inscription under a granular bloom. Low retaining walls and collapsed lintels define former corridors that align to the planet’s high-contrast terminator, producing long, stark shadow bars under Saltharrow’s hard white radiance. Shallow brine pans collect between the foundations, their mineral films recording wind patterns as permanent iridescent veils.
